positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a soaring phoenix rising from vibrant abstract flames and crystalline geometric shards. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and dynamic negative space. Use a palette of deep indigo, vibrant gold, burnt orange, and electric cerulean blue. The style should be a blend of Art Deco aesthetics and modern woodcut linocut, giving it high contrast and a tactile, graphic quality. The print must be vector-like and clean, suitable for large-scale screen printing on apparel. Focus on clear outlines and dramatic contrast.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, ugly, noise, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, fuzzy, cartoon, hyperdetailed, photorealistic, grunge
